conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're evaluating cloud providers for the new analytics platform -- AWS, GCP, and Azure are all on the table.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My cousin's baby shower is coming up, need to pick a gift.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My laptop update took forever to install last night.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: AWS is what most of the team has used before, so there's some comfort there.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been trying a new recipe for meal prep this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My upstairs neighbor had some furniture delivered today, lots of noise.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Azure's enterprise support contracts are apparently great, according to a friend at another company.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my gym membership before it lapses.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been trying to cut back on caffeine, going to just one coffee a day now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: GCP's BigQuery keeps coming up when I look at what other analytics-heavy teams use.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to schedule a haircut, it's overdue at this point.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The caffeine cutback gave me a headache for like three days straight.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The weather's been unusually warm for this time of year.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: AWS's Redshift is solid but the pricing model for our expected query volume looks rough.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Not sure yet, still comparing GCP and AWS mostly, Azure feels like a stretch for our use case.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to call the insurance company about a claim this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The headaches finally went away once I started drinking more water.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I ran the numbers and BigQuery's on-demand pricing came out noticeably cheaper for our workload than Redshift.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We've decided to go with GCP for the analytics platform, mainly because of BigQuery's pricing for our query patterns and how well it handled the cost estimate.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'll start the account setup process this week.

query: Which cloud provider did the team choose for the analytics platform?
